description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden cabinet with a dark brown finish, featuring a modern and robust design. The front side displays three central drawers flanked by open shelving units on both sides, providing ample storage and display space. The top surface is flat and smooth, suitable for placing decorative items or electronics. The sides and back are solid panels, with the back lacking any openings or features. The cabinet stands on four short, sturdy feet, elevating it slightly above the ground. Its overall appearance suggests it is designed for use in living rooms, offices, or public urban spaces such as lobbies or waiting areas.
description: A large, dark brown wooden cabinet with three central drawers and open shelves on each side, featuring a flat top and solid sides. Its modern, sturdy design makes it suitable for storage and display in urban environments.
description_view_0: The side view shows a solid, flat wooden panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_1: The front view reveals three central drawers and two open shelves on each side, with visible handles on the drawers.
description_view_2: The opposite side view mirrors the first, showing a plain, solid wooden panel.
description_view_3: The back view displays a continuous, unbroken wooden surface with no openings or features.
